chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Present: Shamsuddin Abbasi, J. Agha Faisal, J. CP D 18 of 2024: Anwar Ali Kharl vs. Province of Sindh & others. For the Petitioner: Mr. Ahsan Ahmad Quraishi, Advocate. For official respondents: Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, Asstt. A.G. Mr. Aitbar Ali Bullo, D.P.G. Date of hearing: 07.05.2024. Date of order: 07.05.2024. ORDER Agha Faisal, J. This is the second successive petition whereby the petitioner seeks reinvestigation in a criminal matter. Earlier CP D 303 of 2023 had been filed and the same was dismissed as not pressed vide order dated 11.10.2023. Irrespective of whether any latitude remains available to the petitioner in the earlier petition, no case has been made out to entertain this second petition. In view hereof, this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge
